summary.en-US: 16 multiplayer games — play locally or online. No ads, no accounts.

description.en-US:
2P Games is a collection of 16 touch-friendly multiplayer games for two
players. Play locally on one device or online with a friend. No accounts,
no ads.

7 turn-based games support online play via room codes or quick match:
4 in a Row, Caro, Awalé, Memory, Mastermonde, Tank Wars, Ship Battle.

Also includes Tennis (with power-ups), Pool, Snakes, Air Hockey, Mini Golf,
Star Clash, Munch Maze, Wheel of Funktune, Pixel Run, and Horse Jump.

All games feature intuitive touch controls. Built-in calming background
music with toggle. Every game has rematch support.

Free and open source. No ads. No tracking. No in-app purchases.
